channel.title: IT Career Skills on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in IT Career Skills on simeononsecurity

item.title: Soft Skills for IT Professionals: What Technical People Need to Succeed
item.category: "soft skills for IT" , "IT communication skills" , "IT documentation" , "IT professional skills" , "IT customer service" , "IT problem solving" , "IT career skills" , "non-technical IT skills" , "emotional intelligence IT"
item.description: The non-technical skills that make or break IT careers — communication, documentation, prioritization, customer service, and professional growth habits every IT professional needs.
